languages.text: "Я слышал{mf||а}, что вы хотите укрепить позиции династии при помощи ценного артефакта?"
"I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"
languages.original_text: "Я слышал{mf||а}, что вы хотите укрепить позиции династии при помощи ценного артефакта?"

traits.locale_text: "I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"
"I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"
"I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"

languages.text: “我听闻，你打算借助一件珍贵的造物来巩固王朝的地位？”
languages.original_text: "I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"

traits.locale_text: “我听闻，你打算借助一件珍贵的造物来巩固王朝的地位？”

languages.text: « On raconte que vous cherchez à renforcer la position de la dynastie à l'aide d'un précieux artefact. »
languages.original_text: "I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"

traits.locale_text: « On raconte que vous cherchez à renforcer la position de la dynastie à l'aide d'un précieux artefact. »

languages.text: "Duyduğuma göre hanedanlığın konumunu değerli bir eser aracılığıyla güçlendirmeye çalışıyormuşsun."
languages.original_text: "I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"

traits.locale_text: "Duyduğuma göre hanedanlığın konumunu değerli bir eser aracılığıyla güçlendirmeye çalışıyormuşsun."

languages.text: «He oído que busca reforzar la posición de la dinastía mediante un artefacto valioso».
languages.original_text: "I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"

traits.locale_text: «He oído que busca reforzar la posición de la dinastía mediante un artefacto valioso».

languages.text: "Ich hörte, Ihr wollt die Position der Dynastie mittels eines wertvollen Artefaktes stärken?"
languages.original_text: "I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich hörte, Ihr wollt die Position der Dynastie mittels eines wertvollen Artefaktes stärken?"

languages.text: 「貴殿は、貴重な遺物を手に入れて王朝を強化しようとしていると伺いました」
languages.original_text: "I heard that you seek to strengthen the dynasty's position with the help of a valuable artefact?"

traits.locale_text: 「貴殿は、貴重な遺物を手に入れて王朝を強化しようとしていると伺いました」
